allow: PowerShell($names = @\('drop-of-blood','blood','blood-donation','blood-bag','bones','skeleton','lungs','brain','stomach','intestine','radiology','mri','ct-scanner','cancer-ribbon','awareness-ribbon','hormones','pill','pills','flask','laboratory','laboratory-flask','urine-sample','water','sugar','diabetes','stethoscope','doctor-male','hospital','heart-organ','anatomical-heart','protect','security-shield-green','spine','knee','muscle','tooth','clinic','thermometer','vaccine','petri-dish','micro-organisms','testosterone','estrogen','medical-doctor','xray','x-ray-view','body-scan','scanner'\); foreach \($n in $names\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://img.icons8.com/3d-fluency/100/$n.png" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "$n : 200" } catch { Write-Output "$n : MISS" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://healthicons.org/icons/meta-data.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "meta-data.json: $\($r.StatusCode\), length $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "meta-data.json MISS: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
